title: MikroTik SFP+ module S+85DLC03D, MM, 300m, 10G, 850nm
description: S+85DLC03D is a 10G SFP+ transceiver with a LC connector, 850nm, for up to 300 meter Multi Mode fiber connections. Units are tested and compatible with CCR1036-8G-2S+ and CCR1036-8G-2S+EM. Units are compatible with non-MikroTik SFP devices as well
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Multi Mode Transmission speed 10 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 850 Distance [km] 0,3 Transfer type 2-fiber Tx power [dBm] 7,3 up to -1 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 14 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC General Compatibility Universal
